message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate cve_arena result bundles

Standard cve_arena re-run captured by a different runner. Pass/fail
outcomes are unchanged across all four bead bundles:

  bd-15n.2 (fixture parity, ctype/math/socket)
    6/6 pass — strict 3/3, hardened 3/3
  bd-18qq.4 (UAF adversarial detection)
    refresh of the 1000-row uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json + trace
  bd-1f35 (pthread thread-stress)
    8/8 pass — strict 4/4, hardened 4/4 across fanout_fanin_single,
    create_join_churn, mixed_detach_join, c_fixture_pthread_common_adversarial
  bd-1qy (rust mutex)
    refresh of contention_counters / destroy_while_locked_ebusy /
    roundtrip_trylock_busy stderr + trace

The substantive deltas are runner identity (cargo_target_dir moves
from rch_target_frankenlibc_porting10 to cargo-target-frankenlibc-
codex-scanf), generated_at timestamps, per-scenario timing_ns, and
the embedded cargo target paths in stderr.txt. No new failure
markers, no expected-exit mismatches, no new scenarios.

Follows the existing chore(artifacts): regenerate ... cve_arena ...
pattern used by 5ea38080 / 0898630d / 2b46a384 / 0f4e74a1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
